description_long: This is a small, square wooden serving tray with a simple, rustic construction, featuring four thick, rectangular side rails joined at the corners. The tray's base is flat and appears to be made from the same wood as the sides, providing a sturdy platform. Inside the tray, there are two pieces of sushi, one with a pinkish topping and the other with an orange topping, both resting on a bed of white rice. The wood has a natural, unfinished look with visible grain and a matte surface, giving it an earthy, handcrafted feel. The tray is compact and shallow, designed to hold small food items or snacks. There are no visible handles, decorative patterns, or brand markings on the tray.
description: A small, rustic wooden serving tray with thick side rails and two pieces of sushi inside. The tray has a natural, matte finish and a simple, handcrafted appearance.
description_view_0: The tray is viewed from a low angle, showing the front and left sides, with both sushi pieces clearly visible inside.
description_view_1: This view shows the front and right sides of the tray, with both sushi pieces visible and the orange-topped sushi more prominent.
description_view_2: The tray is seen from the back left, highlighting the orange-topped sushi in the foreground and the tray's thick wooden rails.
description_view_3: The back and right sides of the tray are visible, with the pink-topped sushi more prominent and the wooden construction clearly shown.
attribute_rim_design: The rim consists of four thick, rectangular wooden rails, raised above the tray base by about 2 cm, with a flat top and squared corners. The rim is plain, with no lips, grooves, or decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing no visible glare or highlights. All parts of the tray have a consistent, low-sheen finish.
